title: ShowLore
description: Instantly view bonus sword damage percentages and hidden item stats on Polish servers with this high-performance Fabric HUD.
body:
# 📜 BK-Lore

Advanced Item Lore HUD for Minecraft
A professional-grade Fabric mod for displaying, filtering, and managing item descriptions in real-time. 🚀

--- ## 📌 About **BK-Lore** is a specialized HUD utility that allows you to see the lore (description) of items held by players and entities without ever opening a menu. It's designed for competitive environments, trading, or simply staying informed about your surroundings. With integrated multi-line support and dynamic positioning, BK-Lore provides a clean, non-intrusive way to track item metadata instantly. --- ## ✨ Features ### 👁️ Lore HUD - **Real-time Display** - View the lore of the item currently held by the entity you are looking at. - **Full Lore Toggle** - Switch between a single keyword-filtered line and the complete item description. - **Multi-line Support** - Beautifully rendered vertical stacking for complex item descriptions. - **Custom Positioning** - Move the HUD to any part of your screen with an interactive editor. ### ⚙️ Extra Utilities - **Cross-Version Support** - High-performance builds for Minecraft 1.21.1 up to the latest 1.21.11. --- ## 🎮 Usage ### ⚡ Keybinds (Default) | Shortcut | Action | |----------|--------| | `K` | **Otwórz edytor pozycji HUD** | | `O` | **Przełącz pełne wyświetlanie Lore** | ### 🧩 Commands | Command | Action | |---------|--------| | `/bklore help` | Show help menu and all available shortcuts | | `/bklore toggle` | Enable or disable the Lore HUD display | | `/bklore fulllore` | Toggle between single-line and full-description modes | | `/bklore position` | Open the interactive HUD position editor | --- ## 📥 Installation 1. Download the latest `.jar` for your Minecraft version. 2. Ensure you have [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) installed. 3. Place the mod into your `%appdata%/.minecraft/mods` folder. 4. Launch the game and use `K` to set your HUD position! --- ## 🛠️ Requirements - **Fabric API** - **Java 21** or higher - **Minecraft 1.21.x** --- ## 🤝 Links - **Discord**: [dc.bkubiak.dev](https://dc.bkubiak.dev) - **Developer**: [@xqbkubiak](https://github.com/xqbkubiak) --- ## 📜 License MIT License © 2026 bkubiakdev

The essential metadata companion for your Minecraft adventures.
